calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Proveup Hearing; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Long K. Bui
Off Calendar Aug-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:20 am and concluding at 10:34 am.

Plaintiff Fedex Corporate Services Inc. is represented by Long Bui, Esq via zoom video conference.
Defendant ERA81 Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

CHARITY ROCHELLE is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff confirms that the Judgment would resolve the matter completely

Court Finds:
Defendant was served with the complaint on September 18, 2023.
Doe Defendants were dismissed on March 22, 2024.
Default was entered against Defendant on April 23, 2024.
Based on the evidence presented and the testimony of CHARITY ROCHELLE, there is sufficent evidence to establish that defendant failed to pay invoices owed to Plaintiff.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Fedex Corporate Services Inc., and against Defendant ERA81 Inc. dba ERA81-L1N2, as follows:

1. Damages: $209,670.71
2. Prejudgment Interest: $47,034.19
3. Costs: $531.00
4. Attorney fees: $1,200.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $258,435.90

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
